title: Very Essential Ultimate
description:
The Ultimate Non-Vanilla Experience with Essential Mod

Based On Fabric
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ed34f4b480032f02c0faab40e79932ec1f5a5eb.png)
# Very Essential Ultimate

Experience a new game, non-vanilla experience, no blocks added, only features for a better gameplay!


- **FEATURES**
 ____________________________________________________________________________________________
- **Tiny Crosshair** | To dont disburb the gameplay
- **Better GUI** | Better GUI for better visual gameplay
- **Bridging Mod** | Bridge like Bedrock with visual limits where you are going to place
- **Chat Animations** | For a smooth chat with friends and other players
- **Chat Heads** | See who you are talking to by their skin
- **Chat Patches** | Patches chat bugs
- **Chat Tools** | Tools for your chat
- **Essential Mod** | Tools and funcions for your game expericence maximum experience
- **Fresh Animations** | Animations effects just lika a movie, realism and imersive
- **Dynamic Lights** | Light on objects on your hand, useful for caves
- **Low Shield** | Make the shield not use the entire screen
- **Mod Menu** | See all the mods you have and config
- **Music Notification** | Notify when a new music is played
- **Plasmo Voice** | Better multiplayer experience, talk whit your friends whidout doing complex things
- **ReplayMod** | Replay your gameplays and save it!
- **Sodium** | Optimisation Mod
- **Tiny Tools** | Tiny tools for better combat
- **VoxelMaps** | Use waypoints and see mobs and other people




Based On Essentials++ By: eatyourglory
Based On Fabric

If you are asking why should you download this modpack heres some reasons:

**Reason 1**: Expecience almost a new game whit the best mods!

**Reason 2**: No virus trustable mods only!

**Reason 3**: Various cattegories helped like combat and visual optimisation




All mods are on the version Changelog
Credits on the mod name
